Ketchata Koro Mis  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 7 Dmg Bonus: 120
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 7 Dmg Bonus: 120
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Blunt
Stackable:No

Rarity: Uncommon

but the one i got says tradeskillable on it, anyone know what the heck ya do with it, hopefully it make a decent weapon.

# Jun 09 2005 at 10:41 AM Rating: Decent

188 posts
EQ Traders:
Quote:
There are no known recipes that use ketchata koro mis.

Mikaal Drazzminius
Tier'Dal Necromancer
Necrotalk Admin
EQ Traders Super Moderator

▲ Page top
RE: just got one in lake of ill omen
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2005 at 2:34 AM Rating: Decent
Temperance
View User Forum
Scholar
514 posts
I've just picked up about 3 of these in Dalnir.

EQTC will have most tradeskills recipes, and some quest recipes, but not all.
The tag that says tradeskills probably means that, for whatever reason,
a tradeskill container is used to perform a combination.
When the quest is found (if not already) then the recipe should soon follow.
____________________________
~ Muse Temperance the Elf
~ Lyricist of <Mystic Coercion> on Erollisi Marr
~ with a <Variety> of alts to keep me busy
▲ Page top
WRONG recipe
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2005 at 12:01 PM Rating: Decent
Darknyss
Scholar
551 posts
This is NOT used in making the Expert's Twoscale Skyiron Bars.

Small Pieces of Velium are used.

Wish I found that out BEFORE I farmed Dalnir's.
____________________________
Pain Lord Darknyss Grimscale
92 Iksar Crusader of the Greenmist

▲ Page top
Bought it....
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2002 at 8:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776096135
1 post
I saw this on a merchant in FV...I bought it because my beastlord's 2hb is at zero and the this is one of the lowest delay for a 2hb I've seen (if not the lowest). Dmg and ratio aren't good but I figure it will be ok when in a good grp and dmg output isn't critcal...I can then use the delay to hopefully get my 2hb skill up faster. Then I can use the really good 2hb weapons with higher delays and not worry if I'n not hitting.

Plus, the graphic looks cool...hehe
▲ Page top
RE: Bought it....
QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2003 at 8:40 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592340173986
39 posts
What do you mean the damage/ratio isn't good? 7/30 with a bonus damage isn't good? I'm thinking the ratio is actually quite good. Just my 2cp =)
▲ Page top
RE: Bought it....
QuoteReply
# Jun 18 2002 at 6:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249711779
16 posts
A really fast 2HB for all/all I believe is the abandoned orc shovel, a no drop ground spawn item at the orc camp in Lake Rathe - delay of 20 if I recall correctly, but damage of 2. You can get lots of swings in on that creature that is running away.
▲ Page top
RE: Bought it....
QuoteReply
# Jun 18 2002 at 6:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767195740
2 posts
For future reference, I'd suggest picking up a Bamboo Bo Stick to work on 2HB. It's 8/20, and is a pretty common drop in Dalnir. I've seen them given away in EC, or sell for 10-30pp. I'm pretty sure they're BST useable as well, but I'm not sure that the pic here has been updated yet.

The only drawback is that it doesn't look as cool as the Ketchatka... hehe.
▲ Page top
RE: Bought it....
QuoteReply
# Nov 23 2005 at 4:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592274650210
6 posts
If you are looking for a good 2hb for monk or beast I suggest the Stave of the Eternal. delay of 28, dmg of 35, dmg bonus of 21, ac of 15, Planar Strike effect(procs at level 50), dex +16, sta +12, wis +16, int +16, agi +16, HP +120, mana +105, End + 105 Sv vs Fire, disease, cold and magic +14. This is a weapon I have used for my beastlord for quite some time.
▲ Page top
RE: Bought it....
QuoteReply
# Jun 18 2002 at 7:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1692576997126
99 posts
Yeppers, been using a Bamboo Bo Stick, since 1st level, and has helped out immensely. Switched to Adamantite Bo Stick, at 30, and watch out.The warder hold them steady and I smack the <censored> out of them!

Nice item
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2002 at 6:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773019041
View User Forum
9 posts
It's a great item for lower lvl INT casters. I gave one to my wizzy then opted for a Dragoon Dirk to free up on hand for a book or other INT or Mana item. It's not bad but not great eiter, but looks mean.

# Nov 24 2001 at 5:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762805499
16 posts
OK I was in a group and this dropped off a sarnak adherent in the sarnak fort of Lake of Ill omen. I looted it and the whole group was getting mad because i said it was pointless to roll for it, because it sucks. Anyway, we rolled for it and our bard won, so congratulations to the lucky girl, I hope it serves her well. How much is it worth to a merchant anyway?

Took one of these off a sarnak zealot in Burning Woods 8/15/01. Goes to my cleric.
▲ Page top
Good for skill increase
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2001 at 5:30 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I just got one of these a week or so ago while on the 2nd floor of Dalnir's camping the imp room for a guild monkey. Disappointing compared to what can drop in that room, but now i have a good one to raise 2hb with. This is one of the better dly's on a war usable 2hb. I'm a 39 war with all weapon skills maxed except h2h and 2hb. To truly be a master of all weapons, 2hb must eventually get maxed too. Besides, i just got a killer Mithril Staff, and need some skill to wield that baby effectively.

Bigsy Smalls
39 Troll Warrior (lvl subject to extreme change ;)
Proud officer of the Festering Horde
Tarew Marr
